sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-signed-quantized matrix conversion using Q15 scale and signed zero-point with two's-complement wrapping.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational signed integer GEMM over centered quantized operands with INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantization to packed IEEE-754 FP32 using the product of Q15 input scales.
